prompt: Evaluate the incident postmortem and provide rubric-aligned feedback.

criteria.name: Root Cause Analysis
criteria.description: Depth and accuracy of incident cause analysis.

performance_descriptors.excellent: Clear causal chain with logs/metrics evidence.
performance_descriptors.good: Mostly clear; minor gaps in evidence.
performance_descriptors.average: Some causal reasoning but loose links.
performance_descriptors.needs_improvement: Vague cause; weak or absent evidence.

criteria.name: Actionability
criteria.description: Quality of remediation and prevention steps.

performance_descriptors.excellent: Specific, prioritized actions with owners and timelines.
performance_descriptors.good: Concrete actions with few specifics missing.

few_shots.final_submission: Alert fatigue delayed response; refine alert thresholds and add runbooks. Grafana panel shows CPU saturation at 14:20 UTC.
The incident had several causes and we learned many things. Overall, the team collaborated and we improved.

submissions.final_submission: TLS cert expired due to missed rotation window. Add weekly cert expiry check and PagerDuty alert; track ownership in CMDB.
We identified various issues. The resolution path was comprehensive and the outcome was outstanding.
I wrote the timeline myself and then used AI to tidy phrasing and fix passive voice; actions are mine.
